title: Pre-employment screening Cognitive Ability tests
text:
Pre-employment screening Cognitive Ability tests

Cognitive Ability tests · Analytical Skills Test · Fluid Intelligence Test · Business Intelligence Analyst Test · Data Interpretation, Numerical Reasoning & Spatial Reasoning Test · Problem Solving Test · Attention To Detail Test · Spatial Reasoning  Test · Situational Judgement Test · Abstract Reasoning Test · Critical Thinking Test · Numerical Reasoning Test · Logical Reasoning Test · Cognitive Ability Test · Data Interpretation Assessment Test · Visual Reasoning Test · Quantitative Aptitude Test · Verbal Reasoning Test · Pre-employment English Test · English Reading Comprehension Test · Data Entry Test · English, Verbal Reasoning & Data Interpretation Test · Deductive Reasoning Test · Inductive Reasoning Test · Mechanical Reasoning Test · Basic Double Digit Math Test · Basic Triple Digit Math Test · Pre-employment French Test · Listening Comprehension Test · Technical Writing Test

Cognitive Ability tests Pre-employment aptitude tests assess qualities critical to most jobs, problem-solving, critical thinking, attention to detail and the ability to learn and apply new information quickly. Cognitive aptitude is the single most accurate predictor of job performance.
